cn: 他成了吃鸡蛋最多的纪录保持者。
explanation: 最高级 the most eggs；一般过去时 became 表成为纪录保持者。

answers: He became the record-holder for eating the most eggs.
He became the record-holder after eating the most eggs.
He became a record-holder for eating the most eggs.
Did he become the record-holder for eating the most eggs?
Did he become the record-holder after eating the most eggs?
He did not become the record-holder for eating the most eggs.
He didn't become the record-holder for eating the most eggs.

steps.prompt: 对「the record-holder」提问（问"成了什么"）
answers: What did he become?
What did he become after eating the most eggs?

explanation: 介词短语 out of the limelight 表"离开聚光灯/公众关注"；wanted to stay。

answers: She wanted to stay out of the limelight.
She wanted to get out of the limelight.
Did she want to stay out of the limelight?
Did she want to get out of the limelight?
She did not want to stay out of the limelight.
She didn't want to stay out of the limelight.
She did not want to get out of the limelight.
She didn't want to get out of the limelight.

steps.prompt: 对「out of the limelight」提问（问"想怎样"）
answers: Where did she want to stay?
What did she want to stay out of?

cn: 一条 SOS 求救信息被立刻发出。
explanation: 一般过去时被动 was sent；immediately 表"立刻"。

answers: An SOS message was sent immediately.
An SOS signal was sent immediately.
Was an SOS message sent immediately?
Was an SOS signal sent immediately?
An SOS message was not sent immediately.
An SOS message wasn't sent immediately.
An SOS signal was not sent immediately.
An SOS signal wasn't sent immediately.
They sent an SOS message immediately.
The crew sent an SOS message immediately.
They sent an SOS signal immediately.

cn: 这个玩笑在愚人节播出了。
explanation: 一般过去时被动 was broadcast；on April Fools' Day 作时间状语。

answers: The joke was broadcast on April Fools' Day.
The programme was broadcast on April Fools' Day.
Was the joke broadcast on April Fools' Day?
Was the programme broadcast on April Fools' Day?
The joke was not broadcast on April Fools' Day.
The joke wasn't broadcast on April Fools' Day.
The programme was not broadcast on April Fools' Day.
The programme wasn't broadcast on April Fools' Day.

steps.prompt: 对「on April Fools' Day」提问（问"何时播出"）
answers: When was the joke broadcast?
When was the programme broadcast?

cn: 手术开始前，相关器械已经消毒完毕。
explanation: 过去完成时被动 had been sterilized 表"手术开始之前的过去"。

answers: The instruments had been sterilized before the operation began.
Before the operation began, the instruments had been sterilized.
The equipment had been sterilized before the operation began.

steps.prompt: 把主句改为一般疑问句
answers: Had the instruments been sterilized before the operation began?
Before the operation began, had the instruments been sterilized?
The instruments had not been sterilized before the operation began.
The instruments hadn't been sterilized before the operation began.

steps.prompt: 对「before the operation began」提问（问"何时已消毒"）
answers: When had the instruments been sterilized?
When had the equipment been sterilized?

cn: 他已经戒烟好几个星期了。
explanation: 现在完成时 has given up 表结果；for several weeks 表持续时长。

answers: He has given up smoking for several weeks.
He has stopped smoking for several weeks.
He has not smoked for several weeks.
He hasn't smoked for several weeks.
Has he given up smoking for several weeks?
Has he stopped smoking for several weeks?
Has he not smoked for several weeks?
Hasn't he smoked for several weeks?
He has not given up smoking for several weeks.
He hasn't given up smoking for several weeks.
He has not stopped smoking for several weeks.
He hasn't stopped smoking for several weeks.

steps.prompt: 对「for several weeks」提问（问"多久了"）
answers: How long has he given up smoking?
How long has he stopped smoking?
How long has he not smoked?

cn: 他乘飞机去了布宜诺斯艾利斯。
explanation: 介词 by air 表交通方式；travel to 表目的地。

Did he fly to Buenos Aires?

He did not go by air to Buenos Aires.

answers: How did he travel to Buenos Aires?
How did he go to Buenos Aires?

cn: 水晶宫是为博览会而建的。
explanation: 一般过去时被动 was built for；for the exhibition 表目的。

answers: The Crystal Palace was built for the exhibition.
The Crystal Palace was built for the Great Exhibition.
Was the Crystal Palace built for the exhibition?

cn: 战俘躲在树后避开看守。
explanation: 介词 behind 表位置；hid behind a tree；to avoid 表目的。

answers: The prisoner hid behind a tree to avoid the guards.
He hid behind a tree to avoid the guards.
The prisoner hid behind trees to avoid the guards.
Did the prisoner hide behind a tree to avoid the guards?
Did he hide behind a tree to avoid the guards?
The prisoner did not hide behind a tree to avoid the guards.
The prisoner didn't hide behind a tree to avoid the guards.

He didn't hide behind a tree to avoid the guards.

steps.prompt: 对「behind a tree」提问（问"躲在哪里"）
answers: Where did the prisoner hide?
Where did he hide to avoid the guards?

explanation: 反意疑问句：前否后肯 isn't it / is it；monster 表"怪物"。

steps.prompt: 翻译成英文（含反意疑问句）
answers: It isn't a sea monster, is it?
It's not a sea monster, is it?
That isn't a sea monster, is it?

steps.prompt: 去掉反意疑问，改为一般疑问句
answers: Is it a sea monster?
Is that a sea monster?

steps.prompt: 改为否定陈述句（不含反意疑问）
answers: It is not a sea monster.
It isn't a sea monster.
That is not a sea monster.
That isn't a sea monster.

steps.prompt: 对「a sea monster」提问（问"不是什么"）
answers: What isn't it?
What is it not?

cn: 飞机落地前，支持者已在机场外等了很久。
explanation: 过去完成时 had been waiting 表"落地之前的过去"；before 引导时间状语。

answers: The supporters had been waiting outside the airport for a long time before the plane landed.
Before the plane landed, the supporters had been waiting outside the airport for a long time.
His supporters had been waiting at the airport for a long time before the plane landed.

steps.prompt: 把主句改为一般疑问句
answers: Had the supporters been waiting outside the airport for a long time before the plane landed?
Before the plane landed, had the supporters been waiting outside the airport for a long time?
The supporters had not been waiting outside the airport for a long time before the plane landed.
The supporters hadn't been waiting outside the airport for a long time before the plane landed.

steps.prompt: 对「for a long time」提问（问"等了多久"）
answers: How long had the supporters been waiting before the plane landed?
How long had his supporters been waiting before the plane landed?

cn: 公交司机已经罢工好几天了。
explanation: 现在完成进行时 have been on strike 表持续状态；for days 表时长。

answers: The busmen have been on strike for days.
The bus drivers have been on strike for days.
The busmen have been on strike for several days.
Have the busmen been on strike for days?
Have the bus drivers been on strike for days?
Have the busmen been on strike for several days?
The busmen have not been on strike for days.
The busmen haven't been on strike for days.
The bus drivers have not been on strike for days.
The bus drivers haven't been on strike for days.

steps.prompt: 对「for days」提问（问"罢工多久了"）
answers: How long have the busmen been on strike?
How long have the bus drivers been on strike?
